decisions.title: Migrate Explore 1 users to Explore V2
decisions.context: ENG-8140 & ENG-7082 show active deprecation work. Banner and intercept page ready. Critical to 'Nail the Core' pillar and reducing tech debt.

arguments.for: Focuses eng on V2 improvements, reduces maintenance burden, aligns with 2026 strategy
arguments.against: May disrupt customers mid-quarter, need migration support plan

decisions.title: Prioritize Canvas GA launch over additional features
decisions.context: ENG-9437, ENG-9438 show Pass/Fail buttons and status summary in flight. Canvas is 'Embed Deeper' pillar bet. Need decision on scope vs speed to market.

arguments.for: Get feedback faster, validate decision capture use case, iterate based on real usage
arguments.against: Missing key workflow features may limit adoption, hurt first impression

decisions.title: Invest in Sift-Edge sync architecture now or defer
decisions.context: ENG-8855 prototype complete. Critical for 'Build the Moat' but requires significant eng allocation. Competes with core product improvements.

arguments.for: Differentiator for edge deployments, unlocks new customer segments, strategic moat
arguments.against: Prototype stage, uncertain customer demand, diverts resources from proven revenue drivers

decisions.title: Approve CSRS service infrastructure investment
decisions.context: ENG-9455 shows new service boilerplate in progress. Appears to be foundation for Ask SIFT or Python Rules backend. Need explicit approval to continue.
decisions.blockedBy: Unclear which product this enables, need product requirement clarification

arguments.for: Enables future AI/ML services, necessary infrastructure for 2026 roadmap
arguments.against: Infrastructure without clear product requirement, may be premature optimization

decisions.title: Address performance issues blocking scale
decisions.context: ENG-9505 ABAC performance testing, ENG-9504 partitioning updates, ENG-9256 & ENG-9268 L0->L1 compaction. Multiple backend scale initiatives suggest growth pressure.

arguments.for: Proactive scaling prevents customer incidents, supports growth targets
arguments.against: Takes eng capacity from feature development, may be solving future problems

keyResults.name: Explore V2 adoption (% of active users)

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy meeting load (80% of week). Only 8 hours for deep work on strategic decisions. Three 1:1s today suggest organizational velocity check-ins.
alerts: Only 2 focus blocks today - insufficient for decision-making depth
32 meeting hours this week exceeds healthy threshold for strategic work
Zero time allocated for customer signal review or field feedback

events.title: CSRS Infrastructure Decision Gate
events.description: Approve or defer new service infrastructure. Unblock ENG-9455.

events.title: Canvas Scope vs Speed Decision
events.description: GA launch scope finalized. Determine minimum feature set for release.

events.title: Sift-Edge Investment Decision
events.description: Go/no-go on edge sync architecture. Allocate Q2 eng resources.

events.title: Explore V2 Migration Complete
events.description: All active users migrated from Explore 1. Deprecation banner live.

events.title: Canvas GA Launch
events.description: Canvas generally available. Pass/Fail workflow and status summary live.

events.title: Performance Infrastructure Complete
events.description: ABAC optimization, partitioning updates, compaction redesign shipped.

events.title: Q2 Strategy Review
events.description: Review pillar progress, North Star metrics, adjust H2 priorities.

events.title: Multi-Run Analysis Launch
events.description: Run-to-run rules and multi-run calculated channels GA. DES-149, DES-152 complete.

events.title: Python Rules Expansion Gate
events.description: Evaluate production adoption. Decide on GA timeline and marketing push.

events.title: Sift-Edge Pilot Review
events.description: If approved in April: review pilot results, determine production readiness.
